PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Continued To Dec-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Autumn Benavidez appeared by zoom for Edward Ranahan (Petitioner/Executor).

Ms. Benavidez stated that she has had conversation with Mr. Hing, and that when they opened this probate, they were under the impression that the real property in the estate was held in tenants in common, but it's a joint property and they are going to take the property out of the estate. Ms. Benavidez also stated that Mr. Hing has chosen to proceed under spousal property and that both parties want to sell the property before they close out this estate in case there is any issue with the deed. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to December 20, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
